name: Nickel Creek Platinum Corp.
description: Nickel Creek Platinum Corp. is a Canada-based mining exploration and development company focused on the evaluation and advancement of mineral properties containing nickel, copper, and platinum group metals (PGM). The company's primary asset is the Nickel Shäw project, a large-scale nickel-copper-PGM deposit located in the southwestern Yukon Territory. Founded in 2006 and headquartered in Toronto, the company is dedicated to developing its flagship property into a world-class nickel sulphide mine, contributing to the North American supply chain for critical minerals essential to the transition toward a sustainable, low-carbon economy.
